channel.title: Coaches on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts
channel.description: Recent content in Coaches on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts

item.title: Brendo Pudan
item.description: Instructor Brendo Pudan BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. Philippine BJJ gold medalist representing Team Fabricio. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Brendo Competitor and instructor Brendo Pudan is a BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA, representing Team Fabricio Philippines. A gold medalist in Philippine BJJ competition, Brendo brings proven competitive skills to his coaching. At KMA, Brendo teaches BJJ — working with students from beginners through to advanced practitioners.

item.title: Estie Liwanen
item.description: Instructor Estie Liwanen BJJ Black Belt. Open Masters Games competitor. Instructor in BJJ and Judo at KMA. BJJ Black Belt Judo Team Fabricio About Estie Competitor and coach Estie Liwanen is a BJJ black belt and active competitor who represents KMA and Team Fabricio Philippines on the international stage. Most recently, she competed at the Open Masters Games in Abu Dhabi 2026, bringing home a medal for the Philippines. At KMA, Estie teaches both Brazilian Jiu Jitsu and Judo.

item.title: Godwin Langbayan
item.description: Instructor Godwin Langbayan BJJ and Boxing instructor at KMA. Training and coaching across both disciplines. BJJ Black Belt Boxing Team Fabricio About Godwin Langbayan BJJ and Boxing coach Godwin is an instructor at KMA who coaches across two disciplines — Brazilian Jiu Jitsu and Boxing. His ability to train students in both grappling and striking makes him a versatile member of the coaching team. Whether you're working on your ground game or sharpening your hands, Godwin brings focused, practical instruction to every session.

item.title: Ken Menia
item.description: Instructor Ken Menia BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. Philippine Jiu Jitsu Federation Selection Trials gold medalist. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Ken Competitor turned coach Ken Menia is a BJJ competitor and instructor at KMA. A gold medalist at the Philippine Jiu Jitsu Federation Selection Trials, Ken brings real competition experience to his teaching. At KMA, Ken focuses on BJJ instruction — helping students of all levels sharpen their technique on the mats.

item.title: Stephen Kamphuis
item.description: Head Instructor Stephen Kamphuis 5th Degree BJJ Black Belt. 7x World Masters Champion. President of the Philippine BJJ Federation. Building the sport in the Philippines for over two decades. BJJ 5th Degree Judo 2nd Degree Team Fabricio 7x World Masters Champion 30+ Schools Nationwide 20+ Years in Philippines 5th Degree Black Belt The Journey From New Zealand to the Philippines Stephen Kamphuis started his martial arts journey at 14 in New Zealand, when a Judo demonstration at his school changed his life.

item.title: Ziggy Roces
item.description: Instructor Ziggy Roces BJJ Black Belt under Stephen Kamphuis. Brazilian Jiu Jitsu instructor at KMA. BJJ Black Belt Team Fabricio About Ziggy Homegrown black belt Ziggy Roces is one of KMA's homegrown black belts — promoted by Stephen Kamphuis after years of dedicated training and competition. His belt reads "Z.ROCES" and carries the Fabricio International Team patch, a mark of the global BJJ family he represents. As an instructor, Ziggy focuses exclusively on Gi BJJ at KMA.
